subcodes.title: Words spoken at a wedding on 1914-06-18
subcodes.first_line: It is more than one month and a half that I have not had the pleasure of being present in the meetings of the believers. Now the means have been brought about
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @fulfillment of true potential, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
